title: IdeaNode v1
description:
A single candidate idea node in a campaign portfolio, with lineage, traces, diagnostics, an optional formalized IdeaCard, close-prior literature coverage, and an externally computed belief posterior.

Mutability contract (audit-first): Fields campaign_id, idea_id, node_id, parent_node_ids, island_id, operator_id, operator_family, origin, operator_trace, rationale_draft, created_at are IMMUTABLE after creation. Fields revision, idea_card, grounding_audit, reduction_report, reduction_audit, literature_coverage, posterior, lifecycle_state, lifecycle_reason, activation_condition, updated_at are MUTABLE (append/replace semantics; prior values should be preserved in the ledger or history artifacts). revision is engine-managed: initialized to 1 at creation and incremented on each mutation.

revision.description: Monotonically increasing revision counter. Incremented on each mutation (posterior update, lifecycle change, grounding_audit, idea_card update). Enables stale-read detection and future optimistic concurrency.

island_id.description: Historical origin/lineage tag recorded at creation (population partition of earlier campaign runs). Immutable; not interpreted by the current runtime. New nodes may omit it.

operator_id.description: Origin/lineage tag: identifier of the procedure that created this node (e.g., seed.import). Immutable.

operator_family.description: Origin/lineage tag: family of the creating procedure (stable tag for audits). Immutable; recommended but not required.

role.description: Agent role/persona that produced this node (e.g., Ideator, Librarian, Formalizer, Checker).

lifecycle_state.description: Portfolio lifecycle state (required; no validator-side default). States: candidate = in the pool, no posterior written (entry requires posterior null); admission_review = admission or re-admission review declared in progress; admitted = current store-backed posterior, the only state eligible for strict posterior ranking and promotion (entry requires posterior.status=current plus scoring-eligible close-prior coverage); needs_refresh = carries a posterior that is not current allocation guidance (entry requires a posterior); admission_blocked = cannot proceed to admission until the recorded missing evidence is produced (requires activation_condition); waiting_activation = parked on an external condition (requires activation_condition); archived = retained for the record, excluded from ranking and promotion (requires a transition reason). Transitions are enforced by node.set_lifecycle: candidate -> admission_review | admission_blocked | waiting_activation | archived; admission_review -> candidate | admitted | needs_refresh | admission_blocked | waiting_activation | archived; admitted -> needs_refresh | admission_blocked | waiting_activation | archived; needs_refresh -> admitted | admission_blocked | waiting_activation | archived; admission_blocked -> admission_review | admission_blocked | waiting_activation | archived; waiting_activation -> any state except itself is re-entered only as a condition update (allowed: candidate | admission_review | admitted | needs_refresh | admission_blocked | waiting_activation | archived); archived -> candidate | needs_refresh (revival is re-intake; no shortcut back to admitted). node.set_posterior additionally derives lifecycle itself: a write with status=current yields admitted, otherwise needs_refresh.

lifecycle_reason.description: Reason recorded with the most recent lifecycle transition (engine-written; null when the last transition carried none). Required non-empty on transitions into archived. Gives portfolio reports the obstruction/rationale column without reading the mutation log.

value.description: Posterior belief in the idea's significance, computed by an external belief-graph tool from source-grounded sub-criteria.

evidence_count.description: Number of independent observations in the belief graph backing this posterior (effective sample size).

updated_at.description: Engine-stamped time of the last posterior write.

gaia_package_ref.description: Optional URI of the belief-graph package (inside the external project) that produced this posterior.

status.description: Whether this stored posterior is current guidance. stale/provisional posteriors remain history and must not be treated as allocation-ready guidance.
Close-prior literature coverage status. Missing/null is interpreted by decision-layer readers as metadata_only.

survey_ref.description: Portable reference to the literature_survey_v1 or equivalent close-prior survey artifact.

close_prior_matrix_ref.description: Portable reference to the close-prior matrix artifact used by the posterior report.

exploratory_allocation.description: Explicit waiver allowing coverage_incomplete ideas to enter exploratory allocation. It does not turn incomplete coverage into standard allocation eligibility.

literature_coverage.description: Decision-layer literature coverage metadata. The engine stores this as portfolio state; scoring/allocation readers decide eligibility from it.

activation_condition.description: Present exactly when lifecycle_state is waiting_activation or admission_blocked. For waiting_activation: the external condition under which the idea becomes actionable. For admission_blocked: the missing evidence that must be produced before admission review can resume (kind is typically required_evidence). Cleared on transitions into any other state.

updated_at.description: Timestamp of last mutation (e.g., posterior update, lifecycle change, grounding re-audit).
